name: Claim Admin Access (/setup-admin)
description: First-run admin-claim page. Adoption-sweep port of setup-admin.spec.ts (the structural half: the 'Claim Admin' button is the page's single load-bearing control). 'loads without 500' is covered by the C8 crawl + run-level HTTP-500 invariant; this spec adds the structural assertion that the Claim Admin action button renders. Element id captured from a ci-bot CI element-dump: the page registers `button-claim-admin` (the H1/description text is presentational and not registered as a discrete SDK element, so we anchor on the button, which is the deterministic, always-present control). The button-13-mb footer download chip also renders but is footer chrome (not asserted). Read-only; structural only (clicking Claim Admin is a write/destructive action — not exercised; the e2e click-loading-state test is OUT-OF-SCOPE state-mutation residue).

states.name: Claim admin control
states.description: The Claim Admin button — the page's single primary control. Ports setup-admin.spec.ts:46 ('shows Claim Admin button').
